response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the provided lyrics and scene descriptions. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized the provided lyrics for the song performance and manually transcribed the dialogue and on-screen text for the first half. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are synchronized to vocal starts. Applied aggressive truncation for fast-paced lyrics to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: フワモコ！
subtitles.english: FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: FuwaMoco!
subtitles.english: FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: フワモコ見てくれてる！
subtitles.english: FuwaMoco is watching us!

subtitles.original: Thanks for coming! I love FuwaMoco!
subtitles.english: Thanks for coming! I love FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: 今からスタート？
subtitles.english: Starting now?

subtitles.original: 今からスタート。
subtitles.english: Starting now.

subtitles.original: Okay, no problem.
subtitles.english: Okay, no problem.

subtitles.original: Push, push! Go, go, go!
subtitles.english: Push, push! Go, go, go!

subtitles.original: ちなみに、カリオペの他のお知らせがあるんだけど。
subtitles.english: By the way, Calliope has another announcement.

subtitles.original: Oh! カバー曲もリリースします。
subtitles.english: Oh! I'm also releasing a cover song.

subtitles.original: Yes, check it out! The cover song is...
subtitles.english: Yes, check it out! The cover song is...

subtitles.original: “In My Head” by なとり。
subtitles.english: “In My Head” by NATOLI.

subtitles.original: Check it out! In my head...
subtitles.english: Check it out! In my head...

subtitles.original: I like song.
subtitles.english: I like that song.

subtitles.original: You like it? Me too.
subtitles.english: You like it? Me too.

subtitles.original: In my head... please listen to it. 聴いてくださいね。
subtitles.english: In my head... please listen to it. Please check it out.

subtitles.original: そう、あの、このライブの後、そしてその後は…
subtitles.english: Right, so, after this live, and after that...

subtitles.original: メンバーズ限定！
subtitles.english: it's members-only!

subtitles.original: Yes!
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: And we have goods!
subtitles.english: And we have goods!

subtitles.original: Goods are going to be released very soon.
subtitles.english: Goods are going to be released very soon.

subtitles.original: So I wanted to tell you guys... グッズもありますので。
subtitles.english: So I wanted to tell you guys... we have goods too.

subtitles.original: Limitedもありますので。ちゃんとお伝えしたかったけど、
subtitles.english: We have limited editions too. I wanted to tell you properly, but...

subtitles.original: 最後の方、配信の最後の方はCM流します。
subtitles.english: at the end, at the end of the stream, we'll show a commercial.

subtitles.original: But in about two minutes...
subtitles.english: But in about two minutes...

subtitles.original: 本当にすぐ出るから、そのURL、
subtitles.english: It's coming out really soon, so that URL,

subtitles.original: 準備しといて。準備して。
subtitles.english: get it ready. Be ready.

subtitles.original: Ready? 心も準備して。
subtitles.english: Ready? Get your heart ready too.

subtitles.original: Oh, check it out! Here they are!
subtitles.english: Oh, check it out! Here they are!

subtitles.original: えーかっこいい！
subtitles.english: Wow, so cool!

subtitles.original: Dark Fantasy Calliope!
subtitles.english: Dark Fantasy Calliope!

subtitles.original: Dark Fantasy!
subtitles.english: Dark Fantasy!

subtitles.original: Thank you! I'm so cool.
subtitles.english: Thank you! I'm so cool.

subtitles.original: すごい！あの、魔王みたい。
subtitles.english: Amazing! You're like... a Demon King.

subtitles.original: Yes! 魔王 is English なに？
subtitles.english: Yes! What's 'Maou' in English?

subtitles.original: 魔王…あー、なんて言えばいいかな？
subtitles.english: Maou... um, how should I say it?

subtitles.original: Dark... Dark King?
subtitles.english: Dark... Dark King?

subtitles.original: Dark King!
subtitles.english: Dark King!

subtitles.original: 英語うまいよ、すごい！
subtitles.english: Your English is so good, amazing!

subtitles.original: あ、投票終了！
subtitles.english: Ah, voting is over!

subtitles.original: Voting is over! It's done!
subtitles.english: Voting is over! It's done!

subtitles.original: Yay! Thank you so much.
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you so much.

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I'm excited to see what you guys chose.
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I'm excited to see what you guys chose.

subtitles.original: Now then, we should sing one more song then, shouldn't we?
subtitles.english: Now then, we should sing one more song then, shouldn't we?

subtitles.original: But look out for the goods! URL is dropping soon.
subtitles.english: But look out for the goods! The URL is dropping soon.

subtitles.original: Limited merch, check that ね。グッズ買って。
subtitles.english: Limited merch, check that out. Buy the goods!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please do!

subtitles.original: Okay! So, あの、たくさん休みましたね。
subtitles.english: Okay! So, um, we've rested a lot.

subtitles.original: Let's sing one more song!
subtitles.english: Let's sing one more song!

subtitles.original: もう一曲、一緒に歌いたいと思います。
subtitles.english: I'd like us to sing one more song together.

subtitles.original: いいですか、皆さん？
subtitles.english: Are you ready, everyone?

subtitles.original: いいですか？
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: Ok, じゃあ、二人ならやれるさ。
subtitles.english: Ok, well then, if it's the two of us, we can do it.

subtitles.original: Next song is... Gold Unbalance.
subtitles.english: Next song is... Gold Unbalance.

subtitles.original: Gold Unbalance feat. 中島健人
subtitles.english: [Title: Gold Unbalance feat. Kento Nakajima]

subtitles.original: 不確かな物語に 勝ち取るはアイデンティティー
subtitles.english: In an uncertain story, I'll seize my identity

subtitles.original: あれやこれと 手を替え品を替え
subtitles.english: This and that, changing hands and tactics

subtitles.original: ドキりと胸を刺す激情
subtitles.english: A passion that pierces my heart with a throb

subtitles.original: 感情はノンフィクションで 喜怒哀楽
subtitles.english: Emotions are non-fiction: joy, anger, grief, and pleasure

subtitles.original: 一心同体 一切合切の衝動
subtitles.english: Two bodies, one soul, every single impulse

subtitles.original: 失敗も成功も味わえ
subtitles.english: Savor both failure and success

subtitles.original: 我らゴールデンバディ
subtitles.english: We are Golden Buddies

subtitles.original: 意味なんてないような世界で 偶然を重ねた光
subtitles.english: In a world that seems meaningless, a light of stacked coincidences

subtitles.original: 脈打つ鼓動 誰にもなれない 言葉を紡いでよ
subtitles.english: A pulsing heartbeat, spin the words that no one else can

subtitles.original: 舐めんじゃねーよ 小さな勇気ひとつありゃ十分
subtitles.english: Don't underestimate me, one small spark of courage is enough

subtitles.original: 強気に高みへと
subtitles.english: Confidently, towards the heights

subtitles.original: 圧倒 絶頂 二人ならやれるさ
subtitles.english: Overwhelming, peak, if it's the two of us, we can do it

subtitles.original: Back-to-back, no matter what
subtitles.english: Back-to-back, no matter what

subtitles.original: 背負ったもん武器に変わるSpot
subtitles.english: The things we carry turn into weapons in this spot

subtitles.original: 段違い 遠くまで飛ばすShout
subtitles.english: On another level, sending our shout far away

subtitles.original: 誰も邪魔できねぇこのRout
subtitles.english: No one can block this route

subtitles.original: 1等2等3通りって はなからLoser
subtitles.english: 1st, 2nd, 3rd options? You're a loser from the start

subtitles.original: うざいくらい貪欲に ハート地獄からかっぱらっちまえ
subtitles.english: Greedy enough to be annoying, snatch your heart from hell

subtitles.original: Loop輪廻じゃない Routeは無限に
subtitles.english: It's not a loop of reincarnation, the routes are infinite

subtitles.original: ありふれた道じゃない 荊の道を好む玄人
subtitles.english: Not a common road, a pro who prefers the path of thorns

subtitles.original: 盛大にもう 笑えばいいさ
subtitles.english: Just laugh out loud

subtitles.original: 才能煩脳のグラデーション
subtitles.english: A gradation of talent and worldly desires

subtitles.original: どうせならぐちゃぐちゃにしてよ
subtitles.english: Might as well make a total mess of it

subtitles.original: 始めたのならやり切る覚悟を
subtitles.english: If you've started, have the resolve to see it through

subtitles.original: 敗者と勝者のDuet
subtitles.english: A duet of losers and winners

subtitles.original: 劣等感 弾き出された不条理の屑
subtitles.english: Inferiority complex, scraps of rejected irrationality

subtitles.original: 振り払え貪欲に
subtitles.english: Shake it off greedily

subtitles.original: 志は消えない 二人ならやれるさ
subtitles.english: Our ambition won't fade, if it's the two of us, we can do it

subtitles.original: 生きるってなんだ サボった者勝ちか そんなもの
subtitles.english: What is living? Is it a game where those who slack win?

subtitles.original: 握りつぶせ 上辺じゃいられない
subtitles.english: Crush it, I can't stay on the surface

subtitles.original: エンタメライダー 人生賭け 駆け抜け
subtitles.english: Entertainment Rider, betting my life, running through

subtitles.original: 絶望も栄光も Lemme see you fight back
subtitles.english: Despair and glory, let me see you fight back

subtitles.original: どうなったって何も変わらないんだって
subtitles.english: They say nothing changes no matter what

subtitles.original: ミームされた現実に囚われて
subtitles.english: Trapped in a memetic reality

subtitles.original: This life where we're stuck taking chances
subtitles.english: This life where we're stuck taking chances

subtitles.original: 飽き飽きしてんでしょ？？
subtitles.english: You're tired of it, aren't you?

subtitles.original: We're living in a world with no direction
subtitles.english: We're living in a world with no direction

subtitles.original: Reach out with our light 'till we make a connection
subtitles.english: Reach out with our light 'till we make a connection

subtitles.original: Tearing the walls apart
subtitles.english: Tearing the walls apart

subtitles.original: Facing it all, side by side
subtitles.english: Facing it all, side by side

subtitles.original: Once again, it's us against the world
subtitles.english: Once again, it's us against the world
